title: jasminum australe
intro: Jasminum australe, also known as the Australian jasmine, is a flowering vine native to Australia and Asia, belonging to the Oleaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Jasminum australe include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
